title: ilex × fauriei
intro: Ilex × fauriei, also known as the Japanese holly or Faurie's holly, is a hybrid species of holly that is native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever and soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Ilex × fauriei include its ability to support the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and act as an antioxidant. Ilex × faurieri can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible addition to traditional herbal remedies.
